_guide: These helper fields are safe for editing guidance. The app ignores keys that start with _. Edit the nearby real values, not the _guide text.

ui._comment: Shared UI labels used across the site.

hero._comment: Homepage hero section. Edit the rotatingTexts array to change the animated words.
hero.title: Two Lions

introText._comment: Homepage IntroText section. listTitle/listItems control the horizontal loop carousel. divisionsTitle/divisions and geographicFocusTitle/geographicFocus control the cards below it.
introText.title: Holding company incorporated in Delaware
listItems: Development of renewable energy and infrastructure projects.
Development of sports-related initiatives and events.
Development of media, publishing and digital communication projects.
Ownership and management of intellectual property, trademarks and brands.
introText.body: The company is engaged in strategic planning, business development, brand and intellectual property management, and investment in entrepreneurial initiatives.

sections._comment: TwoLionsDivisions section on the homepage. title controls the section heading. items contains the division cards.
sections.title: Business Divisions
sections.lead: The operating divisions of Two Lions bring together projects, brands and platforms designed to generate commercial growth, strategic positioning and long-term value.

investmentSection._comment: InvestmentSection on the homepage. eyebrow1/title/lead control the intro. eyebrow2 is reused above the continuous carousel. highlights controls the left card. pillars controls the moving cards.
investmentSection.title: Strategic Partnerships & Investment Opportunities
investmentSection.lead: Two Lions International Corporation is actively exploring strategic partnerships and potential investment opportunities with U.S. and international investors, with particular attention to the Energy & Infrastructure sector.
paragraphs: The company is developing proprietary concepts focused on infrastructure enhancement, renewable energy integration and identity-based advertising solutions known as Identity Advertising. These concepts are designed to combine public utility infrastructure with long-term brand visibility and territorial enhancement.

The corporation intends to hold, develop and commercialize the related intellectual property rights, trademarks, business models and licensing opportunities, creating a structure for long-term industrial and commercial development.

pillars.title: Strategic Partnerships
pillars.body: The section presents the company as open to structured partnerships, capital relationships and industrial dialogue with selected investors.

pillars.title: Proprietary Concepts
pillars.body: Current development includes concepts that connect infrastructure utility, renewable systems and Identity Advertising in a single long-horizon framework.

pillars.title: IP & Licensing
pillars.body: The business model includes ownership, protection and commercialization of trademarks, intellectual property, operating formats and licensing opportunities.

officeSection._comment: Homepage offices section. eyebrow/title/lead control the intro; headquarters and italianOperations control the two cards.
officeSection.title: Corporate Presence
officeSection.lead: Two Lions coordinates its legal headquarters and Italian operational offices through a formal structure designed for institutional, corporate and territorial activities.

contactSection._comment: Homepage contact section. Submission is handled by a server-side API.
contactSection.title: Start the conversation
contactSection.lead: Use this area to send an introductory request, propose a partnership or schedule an initial operational conversation with Two Lions.
contactSection.note: The form sends the message directly from the website.
contactSection.setupNote: To enable the form, set CONTACT_EMAIL_TO, CONTACT_EMAIL_FROM and RESEND_API_KEY.
contactSection.configurationError: The email service is not configured correctly on the server yet.
contactSection.incompleteError: Complete every field before sending the message.
contactSection.invalidEmailError: Enter a valid email address before continuing.
contactSection.missingFieldsPrefix: Complete these fields to enable sending:
contactSection.readyToSend: All fields are valid. You can now send the email.
contactSection.submitError: Sending failed. Check the email service configuration and try again.

identityAdvertisingPage._comment: Identity Advertising page. sections is the main content grid; each section has id, title, items and optional note.
identityAdvertisingPage.title: Identity Advertising
identityAdvertisingPage.mission: Transform public and private spaces into permanent identity assets for companies, public bodies and institutions.
positioningItems: Permanent identity infrastructure for brands, public bodies and institutions.
Integration of public utility, brand presence and territorial enhancement.
A modular approach across urban, mobility, sport, corporate, premium and media.
identityAdvertisingPage.heroImagePlaceholder: Space reserved for a hero image or a project rendering.
identityAdvertisingPage.programTitle: Public Utility, Brand Presence, Territorial Value
identityAdvertisingPage.programLead: The program brings together projects that turn urban spaces, mobility nodes, sports venues and corporate sites into permanent assets of identity, usability and communication.
frameworkParagraphs: Two Lions Identity Advertising structures permanent solutions where physical infrastructure, naming, sponsorship and media content work as one system.
The approach supports projects for municipalities, regions, private companies, mobility operators and major public or commercial platforms.
identityAdvertisingPage.frameworkImagePlaceholder: Space for concept visuals, mockups or environmental renders.
focusItems: Branded urban and mobility infrastructure.
Territorial, sports and corporate activations.
Premium modules for airports, ports, stations and major events.
Media layer for storytelling, video and sponsor reporting.

sections.title: Identity Mobility
sections.note: Natural integration with the energy and infrastructure division being developed with Ajo Energia and Sagelio.

luxurySardabookingPage._comment: Luxury Sardabooking page. sections is the main content grid; each section has id, title, items and optional note.
luxurySardabookingPage.title: Luxury Sardabooking
luxurySardabookingPage.mission: Luxury Sardabooking brings together luxury villas, hotels, experiences, events, real estate, concierge and corporate travel services in Sardinia.
positioningItems: Premium hospitality and travel experiences for high-end clientele.
Integrated villas, hotels, events, real estate, concierge and travel services.
A Sardinian platform for curated incoming, corporate and VIP journeys.
luxurySardabookingPage.positioningFooter: Luxury travel, hospitality and lifestyle services in Sardinia.
luxurySardabookingPage.programTitle: Luxury Hospitality, Experiences and Corporate Travel
luxurySardabookingPage.programLead: The Sardabooking platform gathers luxury villas, high-end hotels, premium experiences and corporate services in a single Sardinian hospitality ecosystem.
frameworkParagraphs: Two Lions Luxury Sardabooking creates a premium hospitality system that connects villas, hotels, resorts, experiences and concierge services.
The division supports luxury travel and corporate incoming with a focus on Sardinian destination value and exclusive services.
focusItems: Exclusive villa management and luxury resort partnerships.
Curated experiences, events and VIP concierge services.
Real estate, incoming travel and corporate hospitality offerings.

foodBeveragePage._comment: Food & Beverage page. sections is the main content grid; each section has id, title, items and optional note.
foodBeveragePage.title: Food & Beverage
foodBeveragePage.mission: Develop a food and beverage ecosystem that brings together regional production, premium lines, horeca channels, commercial distribution and the identity value of Sardinia.
positioningItems: Multi-sector division dedicated to food products, beverage, hospitality and retail.
Integration of Sardinian excellence, gourmet lines, export channels and organized distribution.
A modular approach spanning product, service, experience and territorial value.
foodBeveragePage.positioningFooter: Food, beverage, hospitality and Brand Sardinia within one development ecosystem.
foodBeveragePage.programTitle: Product, Distribution, Hospitality and Territorial Value
foodBeveragePage.programLead: The Food & Beverage platform brings together regional production, premium lines, horeca, distribution and identity-driven initiatives through a scalable model spanning Sardinia, Italy and international export.
frameworkParagraphs: Two Lions Food & Beverage is structured as a system where food supply chains, beverages, retail, hospitality and territorial promotion operate as one commercial architecture.
The goal is to build a platform capable of enhancing products, brands and territories through premium channels, selective distribution, events and export models.
focusItems: Sardinian signature foods, gourmet lines and organic products.
Beverage, coffee, tea, wine and spirits with premium positioning.
Horeca channels, catering, banqueting and events.
Retail, distribution, export and Brand Sardinia development.

sections.title: Two Lions Beverage
sections.note: The craft beer line is connected to the project already linked with Giunico.

sections.title: Two Lions Wine & Spirits
sections.description: Division dedicated to wine and spirits excellence.

parfumPage._comment: Parfum page. sections is the main content grid; each section has id, title, description, items and optional note.
parfumPage.title: Parfum
parfumPage.mission: Two Lions Parfum turns fragrance into an identity symbol able to unite clubs, athletes, executives, supporters and sponsors through an object designed to last over time.
positioningItems: Identity fragrances designed for sports clubs, communities and commemorative collections.
Integration of physical product, emotional storytelling, heritage value and digital content.
A scalable format for sports organizations, sponsor companies, territories and special events.
parfumPage.positioningFooter: Fragrance, belonging and collective memory within one experience.
parfumPage.conceptLead: The idea is to turn fragrance into an emotional and distinctive symbol, where the act of purchase becomes an entry point into a recognizable community.
parfumPage.conceptQuote: You do not wear a perfume. You wear your belonging.
parfumPage.conceptStatement: The athlete, executive, supporter or club member is not simply buying a fragrance, but a lasting sign of their own community.
parfumPage.programTitle: Club Identity, Heritage Collection and Digital Object
parfumPage.programLead: The division imagines club-dedicated lines, limited celebratory editions and connected bottles that expand fragrance into a narrative, digital and collectible experience.
frameworkParagraphs: Two Lions Parfum builds a platform where bottle design, club identity, numbering, packaging and digital activation work as one coordinated system.
The project can be applied to sports organizations, sponsors, territories, cities and special events, creating an identity object far stronger than simple sponsorship visibility.
focusItems: Club Line with dedicated essences for sports organizations and vertical communities.
Numbered limited editions with certificate of authenticity and celebratory packaging.
Premium NFC version with instant access to exclusive smartphone content.
A model that can support sports activities, events and social initiatives for the club.
parfumPage.visualsTitle: Reserved Areas for Future Creative Assets
parfumPage.visualsLead: The page already includes dedicated spaces for bottle shots, celebratory packs and narrative visuals that can be inserted as soon as they are available.

visualPlaceholders.title: Club Bottle
visualPlaceholders.caption: Reserved space for the official bottle customized with club logo, team colors and progressive numbering.

visualPlaceholders.title: Limited Edition Pack
visualPlaceholders.caption: Reserved space for celebratory packaging, certificate of authenticity and premium edition details.

visualPlaceholders.title: NFC Experience
visualPlaceholders.caption: Reserved space for the digital touchpoint visual: smartphone, club story, video, sponsors and exclusive content.

parfumPage.launchLead: A first official edition could launch as NFC Italia Master 65, with the payoff The Essence of Azzurro Pride and a visual system aligned with the world-championship journey, sports memory and national heritage.
launchItems: QR / NFC with world championship journey video
parfumPage.launchFooter: It could become the first official product in the Two Lions Sport Heritage Collection, linking athlete, supporter and sponsor to the team's story.

sections.title: Club Line
sections.description: Each organization can have its own exclusive and recognizable essence.
items: Padel clubs, golf clubs and yacht clubs
sections.note: The bottle can feature the club logo, team colors and the progressive number of the series.

sections.title: Limited Editions
sections.description: Each release can become a celebratory piece of sports history.
items: Numbered series dedicated to teams, tournaments and anniversaries
Collectible value for players, executives and supporters
sections.note: The goal is to let people acquire a fragment of shared memory, not just a product.

sections.title: Premium NFC Version
sections.description: The bottle can integrate an NFC tag to open exclusive content with a simple gesture.
sections.note: The fragrance also becomes a digital and collectible object with premium authentication and traceability.

sections.title: Economic Model
sections.description: The line is designed to be sustainable in production and useful in generating resources for the club.
items: Limited-series production dedicated to the organization
Direct sales to members, supporters, executives and community backers
Margin that can support away trips, youth development, events and social activities

sections.title: Fragrance Division
sections.description: The vision extends beyond sport into a structured three-line division.
items: NFC Corporate for companies and sponsors
NFC Heritage for territories, cities and events
sections.note: Fragrance becomes a repeatable format across communities, business identity and territorial memory.

sections.title: Project Strength
sections.description: The concept delivers more value than simple brand exposure.
items: An identity object that remains over time
Emotional connection between athlete, supporter and sponsor
A tool for belonging and recognition
A product able to tell the team's story

sportPage._comment: Sport page. sections is the main content grid; visualPlaceholders prepares future image slots via JSON.
sportPage.title: Two Lions Sport
sportPage.mission: Sports division of Two Lions Intl. Corp.
positioningItems: Integrated sports platform connecting events, academy, media, merchandising and facility development.
International approach designed for tournaments, institutional relations, sponsorship and proprietary formats.
Scalable architecture across hockey, padel, sportwear, broadcasting and sports infrastructure.
sportPage.positioningFooter: Events, sports formats, media and infrastructure within one Two Lions architecture.
sportPage.programTitle: Events, academy, media and infrastructure for international sport
sportPage.programLead: Two Lions Sport structures a complete pipeline linking competitions, content, academy, sponsors, merchandising and facility development inside one coherent platform, mirrored here through a mobile-first editorial layout.
frameworkParagraphs: The division is designed to coordinate sports brands, international events, media activations and operational services under one strategic direction.
The model can activate tournaments, academy programs, video productions, partnerships and facility development while keeping continuity between project, storytelling and monetization.
focusItems: International events and proprietary formats signed by Two Lions.
Vertical development of hockey and padel across academy, tournaments and foreign relations.
Owned media, streaming, interviews and social content for sponsors and communities.
Sportwear, facilities and academy as the physical and commercial extension of the platform.
sportPage.visualsTitle: Areas already prepared for future image inserts
sportPage.visualsLead: The page includes reserved editorial slots for event visuals, camps, facilities and media content. Images can be added later from the JSON files without changing the layout.

visualPlaceholders.title: Sport Events
visualPlaceholders.caption: Reserved area for key visuals covering tournaments, hospitality and signature Two Lions Sport events.

visualPlaceholders.title: Hockey & Padel
visualPlaceholders.caption: Reserved area for academy imagery, international competitions, summer camps and amateur circuits.

visualPlaceholders.title: Facilities & Media
visualPlaceholders.caption: Reserved area for sports center renders, streaming sets, interviews or TV content.

sportPage.macroAreasLead: For an international holding company such as Two Lions International Corporation, the most effective sports structure is organized around five coordination poles that keep content, facilities, product and events aligned.

sections.title: Two Lions Sport Events
sections.description: Management and organization of sports events.

sections.title: Two Lions Facilities
sections.description: Development and management of sports facilities.
projects: Two Lions Sports Center with hockey, padel and club house.

smartShelterEnergyPage._comment: Smart Shelter & Energy page. sections is the main content grid; each section has id, title, description, items and optional note.
smartShelterEnergyPage.title: Smart Shelter & Energy
smartShelterEnergyPage.mission: Two Lions Smart Shelter & Energy develops intelligent infrastructure that combines waiting areas, welcome spaces, energy, sustainable mobility and urban identity within one scalable platform.
positioningItems: Intelligent infrastructure for cities, territories, mobility networks and public spaces.
Integration of shelters, solar systems, e-mobility, climate comfort and digital services.
An industrial approach connecting design, construction, branding, energy management and maintenance.
smartShelterEnergyPage.positioningFooter: Smart shelter, energy infrastructure and urban services within one unified platform.
smartShelterEnergyPage.programEyebrow: Two Lions Smart Shelter & Energy Program
smartShelterEnergyPage.programTitle: Intelligent infrastructure, urban energy and next-generation public services
smartShelterEnergyPage.programLead: The division builds an ecosystem that connects smart shelters, renewables, e-mobility, smart city systems, climate comfort, urban furniture and identity infrastructure.
frameworkParagraphs: Two Lions Smart Shelter & Energy designs advanced waiting and welcome spaces where public utility, comfort, energy and communication coexist in a permanent asset.
The operating architecture supports modular programs for municipalities, airports, ports, mobility operators, waterfronts, parks and high-traffic urban hubs.
focusItems: Smart and climate-controlled shelters for mobility, tourism and public spaces.
Solar systems, storage, microgrids and energy communities.
EV charging, micromobility stations and multimodal hubs.
Climate comfort, environmental monitoring and integrated digital services.

transformation.title: A standard street becomes active urban infrastructure
transformation.lead: This comparison shows the shift from an anonymous and passive roadside condition to an equipped system with smart shelters, comfort, visual identity and services for contemporary mobility.
transformation.beforeDescription: A street without dedicated infrastructure, where waiting happens without protection, perceived quality is low and no element creates service, comfort or urban recognizability.
transformation.afterDescription: The addition of shelters turns the street into a clearer, safer and more contemporary urban node capable of integrating waiting, information, energy and identity presence.

sections.title: Smart Shelter
sections.description: Design and construction of intelligent infrastructure for waiting and welcoming environments.
items: Shelters for parks and public areas

sections.title: E-Mobility Infrastructure
items: Integration with partners such as Sagelio
sections.note: This module combines charging, energy and shelter infrastructure into highly visible sustainable mobility nodes.

sections.title: Advertising & Identity Infrastructure
sections.description: The identity advertising concept applied to infrastructure.
sections.note: This area extends the Identity Advertising model into a fully integrated infrastructure and service platform.

sections.title: Operations & Maintenance
sections.note: Operational continuity is handled through service models, remote supervision and planned maintenance.
